worktree_status: P79 working tree modified before commit; final git status recorded in final response.
status_lane_model: official, preservation, community, candidate, absence, conflicted, demo, unknown lanes with explicit verification status.
version_state_release_model: Version/state/release refs include source/evidence refs, confidence, and limitations.
representation_model: Metadata-only representations; payload and downloads disabled.
member_container_model: Public-safe member paths only; no private paths or raw payloads.
source_evidence_provenance_model: Sources and evidence expose provenance; confidence_not_truth is required.
compatibility_model: Compatibility may be known, likely, unknown, likely unsupported, conflicting, or evidence-required.
rights_risk_action_posture_model: Only inspect/view/compare/cite actions are allowed; risky actions disabled.
conflict_duplicate_model: Conflicts are preserved; destructive merge is forbidden.
absence_near_miss_gap_model: Scoped absence/gaps only; no global absence claim.
result_card_projection: Contract-only result-card projection; public search and public index not mutated.
static_demo_projection: No static demo generated in P79; JSON examples are the demo artifacts.
privacy_policy_summary: Synthetic public-safe examples; no private paths, credentials, account identifiers, IPs, raw private queries, or payloads.
no_download_install_execution_policy: Object pages are not app-store/download/install/execute surfaces.

command_results.summary: Clean and synced before P79 edits.
